description: After you successfully execute a command, a DBot message appears in the War Room with the command details.
name: phish-ai-scan-url

outputs.description: The URL address. URL.Malicious.Vendor For malicious URLs, the vendor that made the decision.
outputs.name: URL.Data

outputs.description: For malicious URLs, the reason that the vendor made the decision. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: URL.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: The actual score. IP.Address The IP address of the URL.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score

outputs.description: The geo-location of the URL. PhishAI.ScanID The Phish AI scan ID.
outputs.name: IP.Geo.Country

outputs.description: The status of the scan. PhishAI.URL
outputs.name: PhishAI.Status
